text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 5 

CMR_PROVIDER 

LABEL: Comprehensive Medication Review (CMR) provider type 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the type of qualified provider who performed the initial comprehensive 
medication review (CMR) 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 01 = Physician 
02 = Registered Nurse 
03 = Licensed Practical Nurse 
04 = Nurse
